title: Hasbro Outplays Mattel, Scores A Win With Digital Gaming
text: Hasbro had digital gaming revenues and Magic The Gathering in its favor during the first quarter.

title: Hasbro, Mattel shares rise as toymakers announce multi-year licensing agreement, increased IP focus
text: Hasbro, Mattel and other toy stocks rallied on Thursday after mixed earnings reports from the two rival toymakers.

title: Hasbro (HAS) Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Surpass
text: Hasbro's (HAS) first-quarter fiscal 2023 top line reflects dismal performances of Franchise Brands, Partner Brands and Portfolio Brands.

title: Compared to Estimates, Hasbro (HAS) Q1 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Hasbro (HAS) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended March 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: Hasbro Sees Revenues Drop 14%, Works to Clear Inventory
text: Hasbro is finding that demand for toys is down, while digital gaming remains strong. Overall, the branded entertainment company saw revenues decline 14% year over year during the first quarter, in which the current environment remained challenging and the company worked to clear retail inventory, Hasbro said in a Thursday (April 27) press release.

title: Hasbro (HAS) Q1 Earnings Lag Estimates
text: Hasbro (HAS) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.01 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.04 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.57 per share a year ago.

title: Hasbro revenue declines but tops expectations
text: Toymaker Hasbro Inc. HAS posted a surprise adjusted profit for its latest quarter Thursday while seeing revenue exceed expectations. Hasbro generated a quarterly net loss of $22.1 million, or 16 cents a share, whereas it earned $61.2 million, or 44 cents a share, in the year-earlier quarter.

title: Hasbro Beats Profit Expectations. It Still Has an Inventory Problem.
text: The toys-and-games company reported a first-quarter adjusted profit of 1 cent a share and reiterated its full-year outlook.

title: Hasbro Reports First Quarter 2023 Financial Results
text: PAWTUCKET, R.I.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $HAS #HASQ1--Hasbro Reports First Quarter 2023 Financial Results.

title: Buy Hasbro stock for a 50% return in 12 months: Jefferies
text: Hasbro Inc (NASDAQ: HAS) has been a disappointment for shareholders this year but that will radically change over the next twelve months, says Andrew Uerkwitz – a Jefferies analyst.

title: Hasbro (HAS) Gears Up to Post Q1 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Hasbro's (HAS) first-quarter 2023 results are likely to be impacted by lower contributions from brand portfolios and operational segments.

title: Don't Forget That Hasbro Is A Buy And Hold Stock
text: Net sales declined by 14.93% year over year during the fourth quarter of 2022 and are expected to remain depressed for at least two more years. Both gross profit and EBITDA margins were also significantly impacted by inflationary pressures and lower volumes.

title: Stock Market Sell-Off: Is Hasbro a Buy?
text: Hasbro's stock is down by more than a third over the past year. The price decline has pushed the yield up to a historically attractive 5.3%.

title: 2 Great High-Yield Dividend Stocks for Long-Term Investors
text: A tough economy will test every company, and investors should expect dividend cuts from some of their stocks. While the short-term picture doesn't look great for Whirlpool or Hasbro, both look like solid long-term investments.

title: Of 12 Ideal Inflation-Busting April Dividend Dogs - Buy 3

title: These 3 Consumer Stocks With Over 5% Dividend Yields Are Recommended By Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
text: During times of turbulence and uncertainty in the markets, many investors turn to dividend-yielding stocks. These are often companies that have high free cash flows and reward shareholders with a high dividend payout.
